reference: I have just discovered that I have a mass in my left scrotum that is as big as my testicle. It now appears that I have three testicles in my scrotum. My last memorable check was twenty-seven years ago, and I discovered a liquid sac and was told that it was not a problem.
text: I have just discovered that I have a mass in my left scrotum that is as big as my testicle. It now appears that I have 3 testicles in my scrotum. My last memorable check was 27 years ago, and I discovered a liquid sac and was told that it was not a problem.
